title: Preparing execution blueprint
description: Turning the approved implementation plan into a coding blueprint
detail: Reusing the implementation plan instead of making another slow planning round-trip.

title: Step 1/3: Establish a compatible Next
description: Establish a compatible Next.js foundation for notepad application. Create the root layout, global styling primitives, and any package or config updates required for a clean install and production build. Make the app shell responsive and production-ready so later feature work lands on stable scaffolding.

title: Step 1 complete: Establish a compatible Next
Step 2/3: Implement the main notepad application experience in the primary page and supporting components
description: Implement the main notepad application experience in the primary page and supporting components. Translate the task requirements into concrete UI sections, data presentation, and user interactions instead of generic placeholder content. Ensure the page reflects the task's actual workflows, edge states, and visual hierarchy.
